title: primula nivalis subsp. subintegerrima
intro: Primula nivalis subsp. subintegerrima is a subspecies of Primula nivalis, a type of alpine primrose that is native to the high mountain regions of Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Primula nivalis subsp. subintegerrima include its ability to reduce swelling and promote healing, making it a popular remedy for minor cuts and scrapes. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using the flowers in a salve or ointment to harness its medicinal properties.
